__fixture_tag__: SAMPLE FIXTURE — not real data, for selftest replay only
__source__: AFLOW record schema (illustrative); real fetch via REST API at http://aflow.org/API/aflux/?aurl=<auid>
__honest_note__: AFLOW is a DFT-PBE database of 3M+ compounds (Curtarolo et al. 2012 Comput. Mater. Sci. 58, 218; Toher et al. 2018 Mater. Today 21, 757). Records are DFT PREDICTIONS — not measurements. Many entries are prototype-substituted hypothetical compounds, not synthesized.
dft_method: DFT-PBE (VASP PAW, AFLOW Standard parameters; ENCUT default 1.4× max-suggested per pseudopotential, k-point density ≥ 8000/atom)
is_synthesized: unknown (AFLOW does not curate synthesis status; many entries are prototype substitutions, not real solids)

publication.primary: Curtarolo et al. 2012 Comput. Mater. Sci. 58, 218 — AFLOW: An automatic framework for high-throughput materials discovery
publication.secondary: Toher et al. 2018 Mater. Today 21, 757 — The AFLOW Fleet for Materials Discovery
publication.ml_property_extension: Isayev et al. 2017 Nat. Commun. 8, 15679 — Universal fragment descriptors for predicting properties of inorganic crystals

license: CC-BY 4.0 (AFLOW data policy; http://aflow.org/aflow-license.html; citation required to Curtarolo 2012)
